description.value:
Your physiology and experience makes you relatively resistant to what makes other creatures nauseated. At the end of each turn you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened] condition, you can attempt to retch to reduce the value of your sickened condition as a free action. In addition, when you spend a single action to retch to reduce the value of your sickened condition, you can choose to retch toward an adjacent creature in an attempt to sicken them.

If you're successful in reducing your sickened condition, the adjacent creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|options:inflicts:sickened] save against the same DC of the effect that gave you the sickened condition or your @Check[fortitude|against:class|options:inflicts:sickened]{class DC}, whichever is lower, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} on a failure or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure.
